Apr 5–11 analysis. Hook patterns below are based on Apr 5–11, 2026 content overview data. Switch to Apr 12–18 for screenshot-verified hook scores.

Top Hooks Analysis

Patterns from 1,877 Nusava videos — Apr 5–11, 2026

Hook Patterns — Apr 5–11

Pattern #1 — Nerve/Myelin Science Explainer

"Your nerves are like electrical wires… once the myelin sheath breaks down, that's when the tingling starts."

Dominant pattern across Health Educator persona. Drives highest GMV/video ratio.

Pattern #2 — Symptom → Gabapentin Pivot

"Got nerve issues? Taking Gabapentin? That ain't really doing nothing for you."

Positions drops as alternative to prescription nerve pain medication.

Pattern #3 — BOGO Value Callout

"The gettin's good — 4 for 2 + free shipping." / "Paga dos y te van a mandar cuatro."

Dominant across Value Hunter creators — 223 verbal-only integration videos.

Pattern #4 — Scam / Authenticity Warning

"This is fake, this is fake, and this is fake. Only buy the real Nusava from the orange cart."

Reframes counterfeit prevalence as proof of authenticity.

Pattern #5 — Spanish Curiosity Gap

"No quieren que sepas esto." / "La neuropatía no empieza por el azúcar."

Drives Latina Wellness persona — present across casual + educational Spanish-language videos.

Tone Distribution (1,877 videos)

Casual
~1,314
Educational
~469
Emotional
~38

Sample Scripts

Based on top hook patterns — Apr 5–11, 2026

Symptom → Gabapentin Pivot~30 sec

HOOK (0–3s)

"Got nerve system issues? Taking Gabapentin?"

VALIDATE (3–10s)

"Your hands tingling, your feet numb — and that Gabapentin ain't really doing nothing for you."

SCIENCE (10–20s)

*Show bottle* "The protective myelin sheath around your nerves is made of B vitamins — Gabapentin masks the signal, it doesn't fix the wire."

CTA (20–30s)

"Tap the orange cart and grab the Nusava bundle while it's still on sale."

Spanish Curiosity Gap + BOGO~25 sec

HOOK (0–3s)

"La neuropatía no empieza por el azúcar. Empieza por algo que nadie te cuenta."

ANALOGÍA (3–12s)

"Tus nervios son como cables eléctricos con una capa protectora. A partir de los 50, ya no absorbes la vitamina B12."

OFERTA (12–20s)

*Muestra 2 botellas* "Nusava te lo dejó fácil — paga dos, recibe cuatro. En el carrito naranja."

CTA (20–25s)

"Toca el carrito antes de que se acabe."

Scam Warning Reframe~22 sec

HOOK (0–4s)

*Shows competitor listings* "This is fake. This is fake. This is fake."

REFRAME (4–10s)

"You know this is a good product when everybody else is copying it. The only real Nusava is the orange cart."

PROOF (10–16s)

"Over 22,000 sold, 4.5-star rating, buy-two-get-two-free with free shipping."

CTA (16–22s)

"Tap the orange cart. Stock is low and the sale ends tonight."

Hook scores confirmed. All patterns below are verified from 12 top-performing video screenshots (Apr 12–18, 2026) with actual Cruva hook scores. Platform top-hooks panel cross-referenced.

Top Hooks Analysis

Confirmed from 12 top-performing videos — Apr 12–18, 2026

Hook Patterns — Screenshot Verified

Pattern #1 — Anti-Neurologist Insider Score 90 ✓

"Y lo que los neurólogos no te dicen es que si tú reparas la mielina, que es la capa que cubre esos nervios, puedes ayudar con todo eso."

26.1K views · @vivianadoestiktok · #1 top hook Apr 12–18. Positions creator as health ally vs. medical establishment. Creates urgency + insider trust.

Pattern #2 — Symptom Recognition List Score 90 ✓

"Si se te duermen las manos o los pies, sientes entumecimiento, calor, hormigueo o como fuego, esas son unas de las primeras señales de que tus nervios no están funcionando."

12.9K views · @vivianadoestiktok. Lists 5+ physical symptoms — viewers self-identify immediately. Creates personal relevance before any product mention.

Pattern #3 — Flash Sale + Free Shipping Score 90 ✓

"And today it's a flash sale and free shipping." / "Double discount selling fast!"

2.1K–1.5K views · @adrigomezmemo / @hotshopdeals4u. Direct deal language — no warm-up needed. Works in 6–30 sec formats equally.

Pattern #4 — Myth-Busting Opener Score 90 ✓

"Your nerves can't regenerate without this." / "You're doing supplements wrong." / "La neuropatía no empieza por el azúcar."

@grant.easten / @midlifemomgrace / @didi_finds. Challenges existing belief. Triggers curiosity gap. Works in English and Spanish.

Pattern #5 — Personal Medical Story / FAQ Score 80 ✓

"Yo llevo la vida entera… desde que me hice mi gastric bypass en el año 2009, tomando estas complejos vitamínicos sublingual."

3.67% engagement (week high) · @_mily_mily. Answers a repeated question. Medical credibility through personal history. Highest engagement rate of the week.

Sample Scripts

Based on top-performing creators — Apr 12–18, 2026 screenshot analysis

Neurologist Insider (Spanish)~60–90 sec

Modeled on @vivianadoestiktok — educational tone, verbal-only + product in background, car setting

HOOK (0–3s)

"¿Puedes reparar tus nervios en casa? Sí. Y lo que los neurólogos no te dicen es que si reparas la mielina, puedes ayudar con la neuropatía, la ciática, el hormigueo."

SÍNTOMAS (3–15s)

"Por favor, deja de creer que tienes que vivir con dolor de nervio, túnel carpiano, piernas inquietas, ardor, calambres. Eso son señales de que tus nervios necesitan ayuda."

CIENCIA (15–45s)

"La mielina es la capa protectora de tus nervios. Piénsala como el plástico que cubre un cable. La mielina está hecha de vitamina B — y muchos de nosotros no la absorbemos bien. Ahí empieza el daño."

CTA (45–60s)

*Muestra botella* "Nusava tiene el complejo B — B12, B1 y ácido fólico — en gotas líquidas para mejor absorción. Toca el carrito naranja."

Supplement Optimizer (English)~45–55 sec

Modeled on @midlifemomgrace + @grant.easten — educational, product-as-solution, high lighting

HOOK (0–3s)

"You're doing supplements wrong — and I say that with love."

MISTAKE (3–15s)

"If you have carpal tunnel, neuropathy, or nerve pain and you're taking Gabapentin — that's blocking the signal, not fixing the wire. The wire is your myelin sheath and it runs on B vitamins."

SOLUTION (15–35s)

*Hold bottle from 0:21* "This is Nusava — B12, B1, B6 in liquid drops. Your body actually absorbs it, unlike a pill. It's the same thing they give in B12 injections, minus the needle."

CTA (35–45s)

"9,000+ reviews and it's in the orange cart right now. Let's actually make your supplements make sense."

Silent Urgency Clip6–18 sec

Modeled on @lexiifairy / @dealsbycaser — zero voiceover, bold text overlay, black or product background

FRAME 1 (0–3s)

Bold text on screen: "4 FOR 1 🔥" / "LAST DAY ‼️"

FRAME 2 (3–6s)

Show bottles on surface or hold up. Text: "Nusava B12 — flash sale + FREE shipping"

FRAME 3 (6–12s)

Text: "Tap the 🟠 cart before it ends" + show TikTok Shop cart UI if possible

NOTE

No face, no voice needed. Restock + urgency text = strong CTR. Best format for deal-only posts. @lexiifairy: $131 GMV from a 7-second video.

Shooting Guide

Observed from 12 top-performing videos (Apr 12–18, 2026)

Camera & Setting

  • • Car filming = top format for B12 edu content (Viviana, Didi)
  • • Kitchen setting works for English creators (Grant.easten)
  • • White background / flat lay for product deals (Cupontokbypam)
  • • Black background + text only for flash sale clips
  • • Eye-level talking head — bottle held or in background

Text & Captions

  • • Hook restated as bold on-screen caption (all edu videos)
  • • Spanish: bold yellow captions, symptom emojis (🔥⚡💫)
  • • English: white bold text overlay, clean font
  • • "Results may vary / Not medical advice" pinned bottom
  • • Flash videos: huge bold text is the entire content

Pacing & Integration

  • • Hook delivered in first 2–3 seconds
  • • Product visible by ~0:21 for review-style videos
  • • Symptom image B-roll shown mid-video (foot/nerve imagery)
  • • Visual props: colored wires = nerve analogy (Didi_finds)
  • • "Orange cart" CTA in final 5 seconds

What's New This Week

  • • Silent 6–7 sec clips — no face needed, still converts ($131–$166 GMV)
  • • Reply-to-comment format = 3.67% eng (week high)
  • • D3K2 content emerging as second product narrative
  • • Wire prop as nerve-damage visual analogy — @didi_finds
  • • Gastric bypass angle = medical credibility niche

Engagement by Format

Reply-to-comment format

3.67% eng — highest of the week (@_mily_mily). Answer a repeated question = automatic relevance.

Educational verbal-only

0.93–1.02% eng · $338–$484 GMV. Nerve science drives highest total revenue.

Silent 6–7 sec clip

0.35–0.54% eng · $131–$166 GMV. Ultra-low effort, consistent deal conversion.

CTA Patterns Observed

"Tap / Toca el carrito naranja" — universal

Used across all creators, English + Spanish. Never changes. Reinforce this consistently.

Flash sale time limit

"1 hour left" / "last day" / "selling fast" — urgency drives immediate action even on low-view clips.

"9,000+ reviews" social proof

Used by @grant.easten mid-script. Review count as credibility anchor.

Inferred Tactics from Top Sessions

793 sessions · top 4 hosts = 91% of total LIVE GMV

Title

BOGO in the Session Title

@nutritionnestegg's "Nusava B12 BOGO" title runs every single session — pre-sells the deal before anyone clicks in. The title is your first hook. Make it a deal statement, not a description.

Volume

Daily Cadence = 54% of GMV

@nutritionnestegg ran 11 sessions in 7 days and captured 54% of all LIVE GMV. Volume builds viewer familiarity and repeat purchase intent. Consistency compounds.

SKU

Single Hero Product Per Stream

Top sessions (@gck_007 "Nusava B Complex", @nutritionnestegg "Nusava B12 BOGO") each lock into one SKU. Focus drives deeper product story and cleaner conversion flow.

Duration

120–145 Min Sweet Spot

Top GMV sessions run 120–145 min. @gck_007's $601 session = 128 min. @nutritionnestegg's top 3 sessions = 126–145 min. Under 60 minutes consistently underperforms on units sold.

Day

Saturday First, Wednesday Second

Saturday ($1,407) and Wednesday ($765) dominate. Monday and Thursday have the most sessions but worst GMV-per-session — high creator count, low audience quality. Save your best sessions for Sat/Wed.

Risk

91% GMV in Top 4 Hosts

@nutritionnestegg + @gck_007 + @mireya_remediosok + @journey2wellnessnow = 91% of LIVE GMV. 263 other hosts share 9%. Activate and coach these 4 — then recruit similarly structured creators.

Suggested 2-Hour Showcase Flow

Structure inferred from top-performing sessions. Tactics from top video hooks applied to LIVE format.

1
Deal Open

0–15 min

Lead with BOGO offer immediately. "Tonight — buy two, get four, free shipping." Pin 2-pack and 4-pack listings. Title already told them — confirm it instantly.

→
2
Symptom Block

15–50 min

Nerve-pain + Gabapentin pivot from top videos. "Drop your symptom in comments" — match each one (tingling, neuropathy, sciatica) to B12 or B-Complex.

→
3
Science Block

50–80 min

Myelin sheath analogy (#1 hook pattern this week). Hold bottle throughout. Compare to B12 injections. Emphasize absorption advantage of liquid drops.

→
4
Bundle Push

80–105 min

Switch to 4-pack to lift AOV. "Stop getting ripped off buying separately" angle (from @hotshopdeals4u). Frame the bundle as the smart-shopper move.

→
5
Close + Rebook

105–125 min

Restate BOGO. "Stock is low." Exact tap path to orange cart. Confirm next session day — Saturday or Wednesday for best results.

Audience Interaction Scripts

Adapted from highest-scoring video hooks — Apr 12–18, 2026

Opening (English)

"Hey everyone, welcome back. If you're dealing with tingling hands, numb feet, or nerve pain — you're in the right place. Tonight: buy two, get four, free shipping on Nusava B12 drops. Pinned right now in the orange cart. Let's go."

Opening (Español)

"Hola a todos — bienvenidos. Si tienes neuropatía, hormigueo, ciática, dolor de nervios — estás en el lugar correcto. Esta noche: paga dos, recibe cuatro, envío gratis. Lo pongo en el carrito naranja ahora mismo."

Myelin / Injection Pivot

"A lot of you are on Gabapentin — that blocks the pain signal. It doesn't fix the wire. The myelin sheath around your nerves is made of B vitamins. That's why doctors give B12 injections for neuropathy. This is the same thing, in liquid drops. No needle, better absorption."

Authenticity / Close

"You'll see copies everywhere — that's how you know it's working. 9,000+ real reviews. Real Nusava is only in the orange cart, pinned right here. BOGO ends tonight. I'm back Saturday — same time, same deal."

Data Source Strategy:

Toggle between official API integration and alternative data sources if API approval is denied.

System Architecture

 +------------------+     +---------------------+     +-------------------+
 |   TikTok Shop    |     |   TikTok Business   |     |   TikTok Content  |
 |   Open API       |     |   API               |     |   Discovery API   |
 |                  |     |                     |     |                   |
 | - Products       |     | - Video Analytics   |     | - Trending Sounds |
 | - Orders/GMV     |     | - Audience Data     |     | - Hashtag Data    |
 | - Shop Videos    |     | - LIVE Metrics      |     | - Discovery Feed  |
 | - LIVE Sessions  |     | - Engagement Data   |     |                   |
 +--------+---------+     +---------+-----------+     +--------+----------+
          |                         |                          |
          +-------------------------+--------------------------+
                                    |
                          +---------v----------+
                          |   Ingestion Layer  |
                          |   (Node.js/Python) |
                          |   Cron: every 6hrs |
                          +--------+-----------+
                                   |
                    +--------------+---------------+
                    |                              |
           +--------v---------+          +---------v--------+
           |    PostgreSQL     |          |   Redis Cache    |
           |    (Supabase)     |          |   (Upstash)      |
           |                   |          |                  |
           | - Videos table    |          | - API responses  |
           | - LIVE sessions   |          | - Computed stats |
           | - Analytics       |          | - Rate limiting  |
           | - Content briefs  |          |                  |
           | - Persona library |          |                  |
           +--------+----------+          +------------------+
                    |
          +---------v----------+
          |    AI Engine        |
          |    (GPT-4o / Claude)|
          |                     |
          | - Hook analysis     |
          | - Script generation |
          | - Persona detection |
          | - LIVE playbooks    |
          +--------+------------+
                   |
          +--------v------------+
          |   Web App (Next.js) |
          |   Deployed on       |
          |   Vercel / Railway  |
          +---------------------+

APIs & Connectors Required

TikTok Shop Open API

RequiredFree

Products, linked videos, LIVE sessions, orders, and GMV data for Nusava's shop.

Auth: OAuth 2.0 — Requires approved TikTok Shop Partner app • Rate Limit: 600 req/min

TikTok Business API

RequiredFree

Extended analytics: audience demographics, engagement breakdowns, watch-through rates.

Auth: OAuth 2.0 — TikTok for Business account • Rate Limit: 1000 req/min

OpenAI GPT-4o / Claude API

RequiredPaid

Powers AI content briefs, persona detection, script generation, LIVE playbooks.

Estimated: ~$20-50/month for daily analysis • Usage: ~$2.50/1M input, ~$10/1M output tokens

Monthly Cost Estimate — Official APIs

Item Service Free Tier Growth Scale
HostingVercel / Railway$0$20$50
DatabaseSupabase$0$25$50
CacheUpstash Redis$0$10$30
AI / LLMGPT-4o / Claude$5$35$80
TikTok APIsShop + Business$0$0$0
Total / month~$5~$90~$210

* TikTok APIs are free but require app approval (1-2 weeks). AI costs scale with usage.

Recommended Stack for Nusava

Best combination of tools if official TikTok API access is unavailable or delayed.

Need Tool Cost/mo Why
Shop Analytics + GMVDashboardly$49Only tool with TikTok Shop sales data without API
Video ScrapingApify TikTok Scraper$49Reliable, scalable, handles anti-bot measures
AI Content BriefsClaude API~$30Best for long-form analysis and creative scripts
Ad IntelligenceTikTok Creative CenterFreeOfficial tool, trending ads & creative insights
Competitor IntelFastMoss or Kalodata$59-79Product ranking, creator performance, trends
Recommended Total~$187-207/moCovers 90% of official API capabilities
⚠️

Bridging the Last 10%

The alternative stack can't access data locked inside your TikTok accounts. Here's what's missing and how to get it with a 15-minute weekly export routine.

Missing Data Source How to Get It Time
Exact order-level GMV TikTok Seller Center Orders tab → Export CSV weekly → Upload to database 3 min
Video-to-sale attribution Seller Center → Content Content tab shows GMV per video → Export CSV → Match to video IDs 3 min
Audience demographics TikTok Analytics (in-app) Analytics → Followers tab → Screenshot or manual entry weekly 3 min
Watch-through / retention TikTok Studio Video detail → Retention graph → Screenshot for AI analysis 3 min
LIVE real-time metrics During LIVE session Assign team member to log peak viewers, items sold, key moments in a Google Sheet During LIVE

Suggested Weekly Workflow

Step 1: Export (5 min)

Log into Seller Center → Export Orders CSV + Content Performance CSV. Save to a shared Google Drive folder.

Step 2: Demographics (3 min)

Open TikTok Analytics → Screenshot follower demographics → Drop into the same Drive folder.

Step 3: Ingest (automatic)

Ingestion script watches the Drive folder → Parses CSVs → Updates database → AI re-analyzes with fresh data.

This can be automated further with Google Sheets API + Apps Script to auto-format exports, or with Zapier/Make to trigger ingestion on file upload.

Tier 1: Authorized Partner Platforms

SaaS dashboards with pre-built TikTok Shop analytics. No coding required.

Dashboardly

Best for GMV$49-99/mo

TikTok Shop analytics dashboard. Tracks shop-level GMV, product performance, video-to-sale attribution, and revenue trends.

Data: GMV, revenue per product, conversion rates, shop rankings, trending products

Setup: Sign up → Connect TikTok Shop account → Dashboard auto-populates in 24hrs

No installation needed — SaaS platform at dashboardly.com

FastMoss

Top-Rated$79-199/mo

Comprehensive TikTok Shop intelligence. Product rankings, creator performance, viral video detection, market trends.

Data: Product rankings, creator sales data, video performance, category trends, LIVE analytics

Setup: Sign up at fastmoss.com → Search products/creators → Export reports as CSV

Chrome extension available for in-page TikTok Shop data overlay

Kalodata

Best Analytics$59-166/mo

TikTok Shop research tool. Deep product analytics, creator discovery, sales estimation, and category benchmarks.

Data: Estimated sales/revenue, video analytics, creator metrics, product trends, LIVE session data

Setup: Sign up at kalodata.com → Install Chrome extension for enhanced data → Search by product/category

pip install kalodata-api (unofficial) — or use CSV exports

EchoTik

Free TierFree-$79/mo

Free TikTok analytics with paid tiers. Creator discovery, trending product tracking, and basic shop analytics.

Data: Creator profiles, video metrics, product links, trending hashtags, basic shop data

Setup: Sign up at echotik.live → Free tier gets 10 searches/day → Chrome extension for overlay

Chrome extension: search "EchoTik" in Chrome Web Store

Shoplus

Free TierFree-$99/mo

TikTok Shop product research and analytics. Discover winning products, track competitors, and analyze creator content.

Data: Product discovery, sales volume estimates, creator content analysis, trending categories

Setup: Sign up at shoplus.net → Free tier available → Upgrade for export + API access

API available on paid plans — REST endpoints for product/creator data

Tier 2: Scraping & Data APIs

Programmatic access to TikTok data. Requires coding for integration.

Apify — TikTok Scraper

Recommended$49/mo (Platform)

Cloud scraping platform with pre-built TikTok actors. Handles anti-bot, proxies, and rate limiting automatically.

Data: Video details, comments, hashtags, user profiles, search results, trending content

Actors: clockworks/tiktok-scraper, microworlds/tiktok-shop-scraper, voyager/tiktok-search

npm install apify-client
# or
pip install apify-client

# Usage:
from apify_client import ApifyClient
client = ApifyClient("YOUR_API_TOKEN")
run = client.actor("clockworks/tiktok-scraper").call(
    run_input={"hashtags": ["nusava"], "resultsPerPage": 100}
)
for item in client.dataset(run["defaultDatasetId"]).iterate_items():
    print(item)

TikAPI

REST API$29-149/mo

Unofficial TikTok REST API. Returns JSON data for user profiles, videos, comments, search, and trending content.

Data: Full video metadata, user stats, comments, followers, search results, sound/hashtag data

pip install tikapi
# or use REST directly:
curl -H "X-API-Key: YOUR_KEY" \
  "https://api.tikapi.io/public/check?username=nusava"

# Python SDK:
from tikapi import TikAPI
api = TikAPI("YOUR_KEY")
user = api.public.check(username="nusava")
videos = user.json()["userInfo"]["stats"]

ScrapeCreators

TikTok Focus$39-99/mo

Dedicated TikTok scraping API. Purpose-built for creator analytics and content discovery.

Data: Creator profiles, video metrics, engagement data, follower trends, content history

curl -H "Authorization: Bearer YOUR_TOKEN" \
  "https://api.scrapecreators.com/v1/tiktok/user?username=nusava"

# Returns: followers, likes, videos, engagement_rate, recent_posts[]

Bright Data

Enterprise$500+/mo

Enterprise-grade web data platform. TikTok dataset with structured data, proxy network, and browser automation.

Data: Structured TikTok datasets, video metadata at scale, user data, comments, hashtag trends

pip install bright-data
# Pre-collected datasets available via API or download
# Also offers Scraping Browser for custom scraping logic
# Best for: large-scale, enterprise needs (1M+ records)

SociaVault

BudgetFree-$19/mo

Lightweight TikTok analytics API. Good for basic profile and video data at a low cost.

Data: User profiles, video lists, basic engagement metrics

curl "https://api.sociavault.com/tiktok/user/nusava"
# Returns: profile info, follower count, recent videos + stats

TikTok-Api (Python)

Open SourceFree

Open-source Python library for TikTok scraping. Community-maintained, may break with TikTok updates.

Data: Video data, user profiles, trending content, hashtags, sound data

pip install TikTokApi
python -m playwright install

from TikTokApi import TikTokApi
async with TikTokApi() as api:
    await api.create_sessions(num_sessions=1, sleep_after=3)
    user = api.user(username="nusava")
    async for video in user.videos(count=30):
        print(video.stats)

Warning: Requires Playwright browser. May need proxies and frequent updates for reliability.

Tier 3: MCP Connectors for Claude AI

Model Context Protocol servers that let Claude directly access TikTok data during conversations.

Apify MCP Server

Recommended$49/mo (Apify plan)

Connect Claude directly to Apify actors. Run TikTok scrapers from within Claude conversations.

# Install MCP server:
npx @anthropic/mcp install apify

# Or in Claude Desktop settings.json:
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "apify": {
      "command": "npx",
      "args": ["-y", "@apify/mcp-server-rag-web-browser"],
      "env": { "APIFY_TOKEN": "your_token" }
    }
  }
}
# Then ask Claude: "Scrape the latest Nusava TikTok videos"

Composio MCP

Multi-PlatformFree-$29/mo

Unified MCP server connecting Claude to 250+ tools including social media platforms, spreadsheets, and databases.

pip install composio-core
composio login
composio add tiktok  # Connect TikTok account
composio mcp start   # Start MCP server

# In Claude settings:
{ "mcpServers": { "composio": { "command": "composio", "args": ["mcp", "start"] } } }

AdsMCP

Ads FocusFree (Open Source)

MCP server for ad platform analytics. Connects Claude to TikTok Ads, Meta Ads, Google Ads for performance data.

git clone https://github.com/pashpashpash/adsmcp
cd adsmcp && npm install
# Configure TikTok Ads credentials in .env
npm start  # Starts MCP server on default port

Adzviser MCP

Marketing$15-49/mo

Marketing analytics MCP. Pulls data from TikTok Ads, Google Analytics, and other marketing platforms into Claude.

# Install via Claude Desktop:
{ "mcpServers": { "adzviser": {
    "command": "npx", "args": ["-y", "adzviser-mcp-server"],
    "env": { "ADZVISER_API_KEY": "your_key" }
} } }
# Connects: TikTok Ads, Meta Ads, Google Ads, GA4, Search Console

Community MCP Servers

Open SourceFree

Community-built MCP servers for social media data. Quality varies; check GitHub stars and recent activity.

# Search the MCP registry:
npx @anthropic/mcp search tiktok

# Or browse: github.com/modelcontextprotocol/servers
# Look for: tiktok-mcp-server, social-media-mcp, etc.

Tier 4: Ad Spy & Creative Intelligence

Discover competitor ads, trending creatives, and winning ad formats.

PiPiAds

Top Ad Spy$77-263/mo

TikTok-focused ad spy tool. Discover competitor ads, winning products, trending creatives, and ad performance data.

Data: Ad creatives, targeting info, performance estimates, product discovery, competitor tracking

Setup: Sign up at pipiads.com → Search by keyword/product/advertiser → Filter by engagement/date

No API — web dashboard only. Can export data as CSV for analysis.

Minea

Multi-Platform$49-99/mo

Multi-platform ad spy (TikTok, Facebook, Pinterest). Tracks influencer placements and product ads across channels.

Data: Ad creatives across platforms, influencer product placements, engagement metrics, trend detection

Setup: Sign up at minea.com → Set keyword/product alerts → Chrome extension for real-time ad detection

Chrome extension: search "Minea" in Chrome Web Store for ad detection overlay

TikTok Creative Center

OfficialFree

TikTok's own creative intelligence tool. Trending ads, top-performing creatives, audio trends, and keyword insights.

Data: Top ads by industry, trending hashtags, popular sounds, creative patterns, keyword analytics

Setup: Visit ads.tiktok.com/business/creativecenter → No account needed for basic access

Free — no installation. Filter by country, industry (Health & Wellness), time period.

Tier 5: Browser Extensions & Automation

Tools that extract data directly from the TikTok web interface.

EchoTik Chrome Extension

Free

Overlays analytics data directly on TikTok pages. See creator stats, video performance, and product data inline.

Install from Chrome Web Store → search "EchoTik" → Browse TikTok normally with data overlay

PhantomBuster

Automation$69-159/mo

Cloud browser automation. Pre-built TikTok "phantoms" for profile scraping, follower extraction, and video data collection.

# No code needed — use pre-built phantoms:
# 1. Sign up at phantombuster.com
# 2. Select "TikTok Profile Scraper" phantom
# 3. Input Nusava's TikTok URL
# 4. Schedule daily runs → Export to Google Sheets/CSV

Decodo (Smart Proxy)

Infrastructure$12+/mo

Proxy network for reliable scraping. Use with TikTok-Api Python or custom scrapers to avoid IP blocks.

# Use with any scraper that supports proxies:
PROXY="http://user:pass@gate.decodo.com:7000"
# With TikTok-Api:
api = TikTokApi(proxy=PROXY)
# With requests:
requests.get(url, proxies={"https": PROXY})

Monthly Cost Comparison — Alternative Stack

Tier Budget Pick Budget Growth Pick Growth Scale Pick Scale
Shop AnalyticsEchoTik Free$0Dashboardly$49FastMoss Pro$199
Scraping APITikTok-Api (OSS)$0Apify$49Apify + TikAPI$198
AI EngineClaude API$20Claude API$35Claude API$80
Ad IntelligenceCreative Center$0Creative Center$0PiPiAds$77
Competitor IntelShoplus Free$0Kalodata$59Kalodata Pro$166
InfrastructureVercel Free$0Vercel + Supabase$45Railway + Supabase$100
MCP ConnectorsCommunity (OSS)$0Composio$0Composio Pro$29
Total / month~$20~$237~$849

* Budget tier uses free/open-source tools but requires more manual work. Growth tier is the sweet spot for Nusava's current scale.

Setup Guide: From Zero to Live

Step-by-step instructions to connect the recommended Path B stack and deploy Nusava's Content Intelligence Tool to production.

1 Prerequisites
→
2 Dashboardly
→
3 Apify
→
4 Claude AI
→
5 Creative Center
→
6 FastMoss
→
7 Database
→
8 Deploy
1

Prerequisites

Set up your development environment before connecting any services.

Required Accounts

  • TikTok Seller Center account (you already have this as a TikTok Shop seller)
  • TikTok Business account linked to your @nusava profile
  • GitHub account (for code hosting and deployment)
  • Credit card for paid services (Dashboardly, Apify, Claude API)

Development Tools

# Install Node.js (v18+) and Python (3.10+)
# macOS:
brew install node python3

# Verify installations:
node --version    # Should show v18+
python3 --version # Should show 3.10+
npm --version     # Should show 9+

# Install project scaffolding:
npx create-next-app@latest nusava-intel --typescript --tailwind --app
cd nusava-intel

# Install core dependencies:
npm install @supabase/supabase-js apify-client @anthropic-ai/sdk chart.js
npm install node-cron dotenv csv-parse

Environment Variables

# Create .env.local in your project root:
touch .env.local

# Add these (fill in as you complete each step):
DASHBOARDLY_API_KEY=
APIFY_API_TOKEN=
ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=
SUPABASE_URL=
SUPABASE_ANON_KEY=
SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY=
FASTMOSS_EMAIL=
FASTMOSS_PASSWORD=
GOOGLE_DRIVE_FOLDER_ID=

Important: Never commit .env.local to Git. Add it to .gitignore.

2

Connect Dashboardly

$49/mo ~10 min setup

Dashboardly provides TikTok Shop GMV, order data, and product performance without needing the official API.

a

Create an account

Go to dashboardly.com → Sign up for the Pro plan ($49/mo) → Verify your email

b

Connect your TikTok Shop

Settings → Integrations → "Connect TikTok Shop" → Log in with your Seller Center credentials → Authorize access

c

Get your API key

Settings → API Access → Generate API Key → Copy to .env.local as DASHBOARDLY_API_KEY

d

Wait for data sync

Historical data takes ~24 hours to populate. You'll see products, orders, and GMV data in your dashboard once synced.

# Test the connection:
curl -H "Authorization: Bearer $DASHBOARDLY_API_KEY" \
  "https://api.dashboardly.com/v1/shop/products"

# In your app (lib/dashboardly.ts):
export async function getShopProducts() {
  const res = await fetch('https://api.dashboardly.com/v1/shop/products', {
    headers: { 'Authorization': `Bearer ${process.env.DASHBOARDLY_API_KEY}` }
  });
  return res.json();
}

export async function getGMVByProduct(productId: string, days = 30) {
  const res = await fetch(
    `https://api.dashboardly.com/v1/analytics/gmv?product_id=${productId}&days=${days}`,
    { headers: { 'Authorization': `Bearer ${process.env.DASHBOARDLY_API_KEY}` } }
  );
  return res.json();
}
3

Connect Apify TikTok Scraper

$49/mo ~15 min setup

Apify scrapes TikTok video data, engagement metrics, hashtags, and comments at scale.

a

Create account & get API token

Sign up at apify.com → Choose the Starter plan ($49/mo) → Go to Settings → Integrations → Copy your API token to .env.local as APIFY_API_TOKEN

b

Save the TikTok actors you'll need

Go to Apify Store → Search and save these actors:

  • clockworks/tiktok-scraper — Video data, profiles, hashtags
  • microworlds/tiktok-shop-scraper — Shop product listings
  • voyager/tiktok-search — Search by keyword/hashtag
c

Set up scheduled scraping

Each actor can be scheduled to run automatically. Set them to run every 6 hours for fresh data.

# Install:
npm install apify-client

# lib/apify.ts — Scrape Nusava's TikTok videos:
import { ApifyClient } from 'apify-client';

const client = new ApifyClient({ token: process.env.APIFY_API_TOKEN });

export async function scrapeNusavaVideos() {
  const run = await client.actor('clockworks/tiktok-scraper').call({
    profiles: ['nusava'],
    resultsPerPage: 100,
    shouldDownloadVideos: false,
  });

  const { items } = await client.dataset(run.defaultDatasetId).listItems();
  return items; // Array of video objects with stats
}

export async function scrapeByHashtag(hashtag: string) {
  const run = await client.actor('clockworks/tiktok-scraper').call({
    hashtags: [hashtag],
    resultsPerPage: 50,
  });

  const { items } = await client.dataset(run.defaultDatasetId).listItems();
  return items;
}

// Schedule in your cron job (scripts/scrape-cron.ts):
// Runs every 6 hours via node-cron
import cron from 'node-cron';
cron.schedule('0 */6 * * *', async () => {
  const videos = await scrapeNusavaVideos();
  await saveToDatabase(videos); // Save to Supabase
});
4

Connect Claude API for AI Briefs

~$30/mo ~10 min setup

Claude powers content brief generation, persona detection, script writing, and LIVE playbooks.

a

Get an API key

Go to console.anthropic.com → Sign up / Log in → Settings → API Keys → Create Key → Copy to .env.local as ANTHROPIC_API_KEY

b

Add billing

Settings → Billing → Add credit card → Set a $50/mo spend limit to control costs

c

Build the AI engine

Use structured prompts for each AI feature: content briefs, persona detection, scripts, and LIVE tips.

# Install:
npm install @anthropic-ai/sdk

# lib/ai-engine.ts:
import Anthropic from '@anthropic-ai/sdk';
const anthropic = new Anthropic(); // Uses ANTHROPIC_API_KEY env var

export async function generateContentBrief(topVideos: any[]) {
  const videoSummary = topVideos.map(v =>
    `"${v.title}" — ${v.views} views, ${v.engagement}% eng, $${v.gmv} GMV`
  ).join('\n');

  const response = await anthropic.messages.create({
    model: 'claude-sonnet-4-6',
    max_tokens: 2000,
    messages: [{
      role: 'user',
      content: `You are a TikTok content strategist for Nusava, a health &
wellness liquid vitamin brand. Analyze these top-performing videos and generate:

1. TOP HOOKS: The 5 best opening lines and why they work
2. SAMPLE SCRIPTS: 3 complete video scripts (15-30 sec each)
3. SHOOTING GUIDE: Camera angles, lighting, pacing, transitions
4. CREATIVE INSIGHTS: Trending formats, audio usage, CTA patterns

Top videos:\n${videoSummary}`
    }]
  });
  return response.content[0].text;
}

export async function detectPersona(videoData: any) {
  const response = await anthropic.messages.create({
    model: 'claude-sonnet-4-6',
    max_tokens: 500,
    messages: [{
      role: 'user',
      content: `Classify this TikTok video into one of these Nusava personas:
- Health Educator, Transformation Journey, Value Hunter,
- Wellness Routiner, Mom Advocate, Fitness Optimizer, Trend Rider

Video: "${videoData.title}" by ${videoData.creator}
Content: ${videoData.description}

Return JSON: { "persona": "...", "confidence": 0.0-1.0, "reasoning": "..." }`
    }]
  });
  return JSON.parse(response.content[0].text);
}
5

Set Up TikTok Creative Center

Free ~5 min setup

TikTok's official creative intelligence tool. Use it for trending ad insights, popular sounds, and creative patterns.

a

Access the Creative Center

Go to ads.tiktok.com/business/creativecenter → Log in with your TikTok Business account (or browse without login for basic access)

b

Configure your filters

Set Industry: "Health & Wellness" → Region: Your target markets (US, etc.) → Time: Last 30 days

c

Key sections to monitor

  • Top Ads: See winning ad creatives in your category
  • Trending: Hashtags, sounds, and creators gaining momentum
  • Keyword Insights: Search terms your audience uses
  • Creative Tools: Video templates and AI-assisted editing

Integration tip: There's no API for Creative Center, but you can manually export trending ad data weekly and feed it into your AI engine for enriched content briefs. Alternatively, use Apify's web scraper to automate data extraction from the Creative Center pages.

6

Connect FastMoss or Kalodata

$59-79/mo ~10 min setup

Competitor intelligence: product rankings, creator performance data, and market trends.

Option A: FastMoss ($79/mo)

1.

Sign up at fastmoss.com → Choose the Standard plan

2.

Install Chrome extension from their dashboard for in-page data overlay

3.

Search for "nusava" and your competitor brands → Save to watchlist

4.

Set up weekly email reports: Settings → Reports → Add your product URLs

5.

Export data as CSV → Upload to your database or Google Drive folder for ingestion

Option B: Kalodata ($59/mo)

1.

Sign up at kalodata.com → Choose the Basic plan

2.

Install Chrome extension for enriched TikTok data overlay

3.

Search by category: Health & Wellness → Vitamins & Supplements

4.

Track competitors: Add competing brands to your monitoring list

5.

Export product/creator reports as CSV for ingestion

# Automated CSV ingestion (scripts/ingest-competitor-data.ts):
import { parse } from 'csv-parse/sync';
import fs from 'fs';
import { supabase } from '../lib/supabase';

export async function ingestCompetitorCSV(filePath: string) {
  const content = fs.readFileSync(filePath, 'utf-8');
  const records = parse(content, { columns: true, skip_empty_lines: true });

  for (const record of records) {
    await supabase.from('competitor_products').upsert({
      product_name: record['Product Name'],
      estimated_sales: parseInt(record['Est. Sales']),
      estimated_revenue: parseFloat(record['Est. Revenue']),
      top_creator: record['Top Creator'],
      video_count: parseInt(record['Videos']),
      updated_at: new Date().toISOString(),
    });
  }
  console.log(`Ingested ${records.length} competitor records`);
}
7

Set Up Supabase Database

Free tier available ~20 min setup

Supabase stores all scraped data, analytics, content briefs, and persona classifications.

a

Create a Supabase project

Go to supabase.com → New Project → Name: "nusava-intel" → Choose closest region → Set a database password

b

Copy your keys

Settings → API → Copy "Project URL" to SUPABASE_URL, "anon public" key to SUPABASE_ANON_KEY, and "service_role" key to SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY in .env.local

c

Run the database schema

Go to SQL Editor in Supabase dashboard → Paste and run the schema below:

# Run this SQL in Supabase SQL Editor:

-- Products table
CREATE TABLE products (
  id UUID DEFAULT gen_random_uuid() PRIMARY KEY,
  tiktok_product_id TEXT UNIQUE,
  name TEXT NOT NULL,
  price DECIMAL(10,2),
  category TEXT,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now()
);

-- Videos table
CREATE TABLE videos (
  id UUID DEFAULT gen_random_uuid() PRIMARY KEY,
  tiktok_video_id TEXT UNIQUE,
  product_id UUID REFERENCES products(id),
  title TEXT,
  creator TEXT,
  views INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
  likes INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
  shares INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
  comments INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
  ctr DECIMAL(5,2),
  conversion_rate DECIMAL(5,2),
  gmv DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0,
  persona TEXT,
  persona_confidence DECIMAL(3,2),
  hook_text TEXT,
  scraped_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now()
);

-- LIVE sessions table
CREATE TABLE live_sessions (
  id UUID DEFAULT gen_random_uuid() PRIMARY KEY,
  title TEXT,
  date TIMESTAMPTZ,
  duration_minutes INTEGER,
  peak_viewers INTEGER,
  avg_viewers INTEGER,
  comments INTEGER,
  items_sold INTEGER,
  gmv DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0,
  scraped_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now()
);

-- Content briefs table
CREATE TABLE content_briefs (
  id UUID DEFAULT gen_random_uuid() PRIMARY KEY,
  brief_type TEXT, -- 'hooks', 'scripts', 'shooting_guide', 'live_playbook'
  content JSONB,
  generated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now()
);

-- Persona analytics
CREATE TABLE persona_stats (
  persona TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  video_count INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
  total_views BIGINT DEFAULT 0,
  total_gmv DECIMAL(12,2) DEFAULT 0,
  avg_engagement DECIMAL(5,2),
  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now()
);

-- Competitor data
CREATE TABLE competitor_products (
  id UUID DEFAULT gen_random_uuid() PRIMARY KEY,
  product_name TEXT,
  estimated_sales INTEGER,
  estimated_revenue DECIMAL(10,2),
  top_creator TEXT,
  video_count INTEGER,
  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now()
);

-- Create indexes for fast queries
CREATE INDEX idx_videos_product ON videos(product_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_videos_persona ON videos(persona);
CREATE INDEX idx_videos_gmv ON videos(gmv DESC);
CREATE INDEX idx_live_gmv ON live_sessions(gmv DESC);
# lib/supabase.ts — Database client:
import { createClient } from '@supabase/supabase-js';

export const supabase = createClient(
  process.env.SUPABASE_URL!,
  process.env.SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY!
);

// Example: Get top videos by GMV
export async function getTopVideos(limit = 15) {
  const { data } = await supabase
    .from('videos')
    .select('*, products(name)')
    .order('gmv', { ascending: false })
    .limit(limit);
  return data;
}

// Example: Get persona stats
export async function getPersonaStats() {
  const { data } = await supabase
    .from('persona_stats')
    .select('*')
    .order('total_gmv', { ascending: false });
  return data;
}
8

Deploy to Production

~30 min

Get the tool live on a server so your team can access it from anywhere.

Option A: Vercel (Recommended)

Free-$20/mo

Best for Next.js apps. Automatic deploys on git push, built-in serverless functions for cron jobs.

# 1. Push your code to GitHub:
git init
git add .
git commit -m "Initial commit: Nusava Content Intelligence Tool"
git remote add origin https://github.com/nusava/content-intel.git
git push -u origin main

# 2. Connect to Vercel:
npm install -g vercel
vercel login
vercel

# 3. Add environment variables:
vercel env add DASHBOARDLY_API_KEY
vercel env add APIFY_API_TOKEN
vercel env add ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
vercel env add SUPABASE_URL
vercel env add SUPABASE_ANON_KEY
vercel env add SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY

# 4. Deploy:
vercel --prod

# Your app is now live at: nusava-intel.vercel.app
# Set up custom domain: vercel domains add intel.nusava.com

Set up cron jobs (vercel.json):

{
  "crons": [
    {
      "path": "/api/cron/scrape-videos",
      "schedule": "0 */6 * * *"
    },
    {
      "path": "/api/cron/generate-briefs",
      "schedule": "0 8 * * 1"
    },
    {
      "path": "/api/cron/sync-gmv",
      "schedule": "0 0 * * *"
    }
  ]
}

Scrapes videos every 6hrs, generates briefs every Monday 8am, syncs GMV daily at midnight.

Option B: Railway

$5-20/mo

Better for long-running background processes (persistent cron jobs, workers). Supports Docker.

# 1. Install Railway CLI:
npm install -g @railway/cli
railway login

# 2. Create a new project:
railway init
railway link  # Select your project

# 3. Add environment variables:
railway variables set DASHBOARDLY_API_KEY=xxx
railway variables set APIFY_API_TOKEN=xxx
railway variables set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=xxx
railway variables set SUPABASE_URL=xxx
railway variables set SUPABASE_ANON_KEY=xxx
railway variables set SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY=xxx

# 4. Deploy:
railway up

# 5. Add custom domain:
railway domain  # Generates a URL like nusava-intel.up.railway.app
# Or add custom: Settings → Domains → intel.nusava.com

Option C: VPS (DigitalOcean / Hetzner)

$6-24/mo

Full control. Best if you need persistent background processes, heavy scraping, or data storage.

# 1. Create a droplet (DigitalOcean) or server (Hetzner):
#    - Ubuntu 22.04, 2GB RAM, 1 vCPU (~$6-12/mo)

# 2. SSH in and set up:
ssh root@your-server-ip
apt update && apt upgrade -y
curl -fsSL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_18.x | bash -
apt install -y nodejs nginx certbot python3-certbot-nginx

# 3. Clone and build:
git clone https://github.com/nusava/content-intel.git
cd content-intel
cp .env.example .env  # Fill in your keys
npm install
npm run build

# 4. Set up PM2 for process management:
npm install -g pm2
pm2 start npm --name "nusava-intel" -- start
pm2 startup  # Auto-start on reboot
pm2 save

# 5. Configure Nginx reverse proxy:
# /etc/nginx/sites-available/nusava-intel
server {
    server_name intel.nusava.com;
    location / {
        proxy_pass http://localhost:3000;
        proxy_http_version 1.1;
        proxy_set_header Upgrade $http_upgrade;
        proxy_set_header Connection 'upgrade';
        proxy_set_header Host $host;
    }
}

# 6. Enable HTTPS:
ln -s /etc/nginx/sites-available/nusava-intel /etc/nginx/sites-enabled/
nginx -t && systemctl restart nginx
certbot --nginx -d intel.nusava.com

Post-Deploy Checklist

Verify Connections

  • ☐ Dashboardly syncing products & GMV data
  • ☐ Apify scraper returning video data
  • ☐ Claude API generating content briefs
  • ☐ Supabase tables populated with data
  • ☐ Cron jobs running on schedule

Security & Access

  • ☐ .env.local not committed to Git
  • ☐ Supabase Row Level Security (RLS) enabled
  • ☐ API rate limits configured
  • ☐ HTTPS enabled on custom domain
  • ☐ Team members invited with proper roles

Weekly Routine

  • ☐ Export Seller Center CSVs (Mon, 5 min)
  • ☐ Screenshot TikTok Analytics demographics
  • ☐ Review AI-generated content briefs
  • ☐ Check FastMoss/Kalodata competitor alerts
  • ☐ Review Creative Center for new trends

Estimated Timeline

Day 1: Prerequisites + Dashboardly + Supabase

Day 2: Apify + Claude API integration

Day 3: FastMoss/Kalodata + Creative Center

Day 4-5: Build web app UI + connect all data

Day 6: Deploy + test cron jobs

Day 7: QA + invite team + go live
